zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington於1410年5月3日出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，他的父親Robert de Legh IV23歲，母親Matilda Norley20歲。他與Isabell Stanley結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他於1682年住在英國英格蘭爾。他去世於1479年1月29日享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington于1410年5月3日出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，他的父亲Robert de Legh IV23岁，母亲Matilda Norley20岁。他与Isabell Stanley结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他于1682年住在英国英格兰爾。他去世于1479年1月29日享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington was born on 3 May 1410, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert de Legh IV, was 23 and his mother, Matilda Norley, was 20. He married Isabell Stanley. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. He lived in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1682. He died on 29 January 1479, at the age of 68, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington est né le 3 mai 1410, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh IV, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Matilda Norley, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabell Stanley. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Il a vécu à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1682. Il est décédé le 29 janvier 1479, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington am 3. Mai 1410 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Legh IV 23 und seine Mutter Matilda Norley 20. Er hat Isabell Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. 1682 hat er in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 29. Januar 1479 im Alter von 68 Jahren und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington è nato il il 3 maggio 1410 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Legh IV, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Norley, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabell Stanley. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 10 figlie. Vissuto a Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1682. Morì il 29 gennaio 1479, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlingtonが1410年5月3日にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh IVは23歳，母Matilda Norleyは20歳であった。Isabell Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1682年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1479年1月29日に68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington(이)가 1410년 5월 3일 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Legh IV(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Norley(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Isabell Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 1682년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 살았다. 그는 1479년 1월 29일 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.3 May 1410–29 January 1479: 3 de maio de 1410–29 de janeiro de 1479
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington nasceu em 3 de maio de 1410, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Legh IV, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Norley, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabell Stanley. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele viveu em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1682. Ele faleceu em 29 de janeiro de 1479, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington родился 3 мая 1410 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Legh IV было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Norley, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabell Stanley. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он жил в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1682 году. Он умер 29 января 1479 г. в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.3 May 1410–29 January 1479: 3 de mayo de 1410–29 de enero de 1479
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington nació el 3 de mayo de 1410, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Legh IV, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Matilda Norley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabell Stanley. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Vivió en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1682. Murió el 29 de enero de 1479, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
